name: Mae Martin
blurb: After developing the acclaimed Edinburgh show Dope, Martin co-created and starred in the Channel 4 and Netflix series Feel Good.
bio: Mae Martin is a Canadian comedian, actor, and screenwriter known for fast, personal stand-up about identity, addiction, and relationships. After developing the acclaimed Edinburgh show Dope, Martin co-created and starred in the Channel 4 and Netflix series Feel Good. Martin released the Netflix stand-up special SAP in 2023 and uses they/them pronouns.

timeline.ev: Edinburgh show Dope is shortlisted for the Edinburgh Comedy Awards
Dope released as a Netflix special in Comedians of the World
Feel Good premieres on Channel 4 and Netflix
Comes out as non-binary and begins using they/them pronouns
Releases the Netflix stand-up special SAP

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award shortlist for Dope
BAFTA TV Award nomination for Feel Good
